Use the form as usual — the featured-image field now writes to the MediaLibrary
string column data) is intentionally deferred — that requires careful schema-migration design that doesn't fit a feature-flag layer.
If you want the full integration today, override the
Then point the package at your model:

// (post_model is not currently a config key — track this in

Swapping the post model isn't a config option in v1.4 — that lands in Phase 3 along with the model-side integration. Watch the
When Phase 3 lands, existing posts with a
string path will be migrated to MediaLibrary entries via a console command. Until then, two options:
— leave the flag off. No migration required.
— write your own script to copy

Both Tapix and FilaForms blogs (which this package replaces) use the same string-column approach, so flipping the flag without migration leaves you in a usable state — new posts go to MediaLibrary, old posts keep using the string path. The shipped views render whichever exists.
